connectors.name: github
connectors.description: GitHub's official MCP server. Repos, issues, PRs, code search, Actions/CI, and more over Streamable HTTP.

connectors.name: playwright
connectors.description: Browser automation MCP server — navigate, click, type, screenshot, and scrape pages via a headless Chromium.

connectors.name: filesystem
connectors.description: Reference MCP server for local filesystem access, scoped to a workspace directory. Read, write, and list files.

connectors.name: memory
connectors.description: Reference MCP server providing a persistent knowledge-graph memory (entities, relations, observations).

connectors.name: sequentialthinking
connectors.description: Reference MCP server for structured step-by-step reasoning and problem decomposition.

connectors.name: gmail
connectors.description: Read, search, and send email in Gmail. Requires Google OAuth — connect interactively rather than via env token.

connectors.name: google-drive
connectors.description: Search and read files in Google Drive. Requires Google OAuth.

connectors.name: slack
connectors.description: Read and post messages, list channels, and search a Slack workspace. Requires a Slack app token.

connectors.name: notion
connectors.description: Read and update Notion pages and databases. Requires a Notion integration token.

connectors.name: linear
connectors.description: Manage Linear issues, projects, and cycles. Requires a Linear API key / OAuth.

connectors.name: sentry
connectors.description: Query Sentry issues and events for error monitoring. Requires a Sentry auth token.

connectors.name: figma
connectors.description: Generate diagrams and read design context from Figma. Requires a Figma access token.
